title: Relations, Rows, Domains, Keys, and Missing Information · Relational Recall
summary: Support tickets, teams, members, and events must become a precise relational model without duplicate identity or invented missing values. Learners retrieve rules and procedures before seeing feedback. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for a key-and-null-aware relational model after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Explain relations, tuples, attributes, domains, degree, cardinality, and why row order is not relational meaning.
Distinguish superkeys, candidate keys, primary keys, alternate keys, and stable surrogate identifiers.
Model optional and required references with foreign keys and predict update or delete consequences.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.sql:
-- sql-basics cumulative relational data portfolio.
-- Each increment declares grain, predicts cardinality or changed rows, runs in fresh browser SQLite,
-- reconciles results, tests changed data, and records PostgreSQL or standard-SQL boundaries.

SELECT sqlite_version() AS browser_sqlite_version;

steps.title: Relation Domain · changed case · Review Relation Domain
steps.instruction:
review case — Model teams, members, tickets, and events where members may be unassigned, ticket titles repeat, and one ticket has 4 events. Declare row grain, candidate keys, cardinalities, NULL meaning, dependencies, and lossless relationships. Competency probe: Explain relations, tuples, attributes, domains, degree, cardinality, and why row order is not relational meaning.

Which action demonstrates Relation Domain without dropping earlier contracts?

Evidence target: Relation Domain · changed case · Review Relation Domain.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for explain relations, tuples, attributes, domains, degree, cardinality, and why row order is not relational meaning. For Relation Domain · changed case · Review Relation Domain, keep Relation Domain connected to executable relational evidence.
